meta.title: Backblaze Labs
meta.tagline: Open source experiments, integrations, and tools built on Backblaze B2.
meta.description: Curated open source projects working with Backblaze B2 — SDKs, agent skills, IDE extensions, awesome lists, reference pipelines, and upstream integrations. Maintained by Backblaze Labs and the community.

integrations.title: MLflow
integrations.tagline: Backblaze B2 as the MLflow artifact store.
integrations.description: MLflow's tracking server supports Backblaze B2 directly via the S3-compatible API. Configure `MLFLOW_S3_ENDPOINT_URL` and your B2 credentials, and your runs, models, and artifacts persist to B2 — no extra plugin, fully documented upstream.

integrations.title: CVAT
integrations.tagline: Backblaze B2 as a cloud storage backend for CVAT.
integrations.description: CVAT — the open source computer vision annotation tool — supports Backblaze B2 as an S3-compatible cloud storage. Attach B2 buckets to your projects to store annotation source data and exported results without paying egress fees.

integrations.title: Genblaze
integrations.tagline: Generative AI media pipelines, with provenance.
integrations.description: Open source Python SDK that orchestrates generative AI media pipelines across video, audio, and image providers — with built-in provenance for every output, persisted to Backblaze B2.

integrations.title: B2 Cloud Storage Skill
integrations.tagline: Manage B2 from Claude in natural language.
integrations.description: Claude Skill for Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage management from the terminal. Manage buckets, list and search files, audit storage usage, detect stale or large objects, review security posture, and safely clean up data using natural language.

integrations.title: HF Cache Sync
integrations.tagline: Shared Hugging Face cache for teams.
integrations.description: Sync local Hugging Face cache to Backblaze B2 or S3, eliminate repeated downloads, and enable fast, consistent model access across machines and CI runners.

integrations.title: jupyter-b2
integrations.tagline: %b2 magic and fsspec backend for Jupyter.
integrations.description: Jupyter/IPython magic commands and fsspec backend for Backblaze B2. Load datasets, save models, and manage cloud storage — all from your notebook with simple %b2 commands. No boilerplate, no SDK ceremony.

integrations.title: jupyterlab-b2
integrations.tagline: Native B2 file browser inside JupyterLab.
integrations.description: JupyterLab extension that registers Backblaze B2 as a native drive — same look, same breadcrumbs, drag-and-drop upload, click-to-open, and full bucket management from the sidebar.

integrations.title: B2 for VS Code
integrations.tagline: Browse and manage B2 inside your editor.
integrations.description: Bucket explorer, auto-detected credentials, file open/download/rename/delete, Copilot tools for B2 operations, and SARIF-compatible structured logging for CI/CD — all without leaving VS Code.

integrations.title: Genblaze × GMICloud
integrations.tagline: Image-to-video pipeline in ~100 lines.
integrations.description: Sample app that composes GMICloud image and video models with Genblaze and persists every artifact to B2 with a SHA-256-verified manifest. One prompt becomes an anchor image, then fans out concurrently to three video models.

integrations.title: NVIDIA Nemotron × Genblaze
integrations.tagline: Reference pipeline with Nemotron + B2.
integrations.description: Reference pipeline showing how to use NVIDIA Nemotron models with Genblaze and persist artifacts to Backblaze B2.

integrations.title: Awesome Agent Infrastructure
integrations.tagline: Memory, sandboxes, MCP, and more.
integrations.description: A curated list of AI agent infrastructure: memory stores, vector databases, execution sandboxes, MCP servers, tool registries, observability, and evaluation tools for building and running autonomous agents.

integrations.title: Awesome ML Data Pipelines
integrations.tagline: Versioning, labeling, feature stores.
integrations.description: A curated list of ML data pipeline tools: dataset versioning, labeling, feature stores, workflow orchestration, data loaders, and storage infrastructure for training and inference.

integrations.title: Awesome Multimodal Data
integrations.tagline: Video, image, audio, 3D, robotics.
integrations.description: A curated list of multimodal AI datasets and data infrastructure: video, image, audio, 3D, and robotics data, with formats, loaders, versioning, and labeling tools for large-scale training.

integrations.title: Awesome Image Generation
integrations.tagline: Text-to-image APIs, SDKs, and tools.
integrations.description: A curated list of AI image generation APIs, SDKs, and tools including text-to-image, image editing, diffusion models, generative art systems, and multimodal AI platforms.

integrations.title: Awesome Video Generation
integrations.tagline: Text-to-video, editing, multimodal.
integrations.description: A curated list of AI video generation APIs, SDKs, and tools including text-to-video, video editing, multimodal generation, diffusion models, and generative AI platforms.

integrations.title: Awesome Audio Generation
integrations.tagline: TTS, speech synthesis, music, voice cloning.
integrations.description: A curated list of AI audio generation APIs, SDKs, and tools including text-to-speech, speech synthesis, music generation, voice cloning, sound design, and generative AI platforms.

integrations.title: Awesome Physical AI
integrations.tagline: Robotics, world models, sim-to-real.
integrations.description: A curated list of physical AI tools: robotics foundation models, world models, simulators, teleoperation, sim-to-real, and embodied AI datasets for robot learning and autonomous systems.

integrations.title: ComfyUI Cloud Storage
integrations.tagline: ComfyUI cloud storage nodes with Backblaze B2 and S3-compatible support.
integrations.description: ComfyUI cloud storage nodes with Backblaze B2 and S3-compatible support. Upload images, video, and audio, and manage AI models across machines with a unified workflow.

integrations.title: Vibe Coding Starter Kit
integrations.tagline: Starter kit for vibe coders building apps with file uploads and object storage.
integrations.description: Starter kit for vibe coders building apps with file uploads and object storage. This full-stack dashboard template integrates with Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage and includes secure upload flows, file browsing, and basic storage management.

integrations.title: Agentic RAG Starter Kit
integrations.tagline: Agentic RAG starter kit with Langchain, LanceDB, and Backblaze B2.
integrations.description: Agentic RAG vector starter kit with AI coding agent architecture, Langchain, LanceDB, and Backblaze B2 for document upload, semantic search, grounded chat, and document citations.

integrations.title: Zero-shot Image Classifier
integrations.tagline: Browser image classification with OpenAI CLIP and Transformers.js.
integrations.description: Browser-based image classification example application using OpenAI CLIP and Transformers.js. Upload images, run zero-shot classification with custom labels directly in the browser, and store images plus results in S3-compatible Backblaze B2 cloud object storage using pre-signed uploads.

integrations.title: Whisper Transcriber
integrations.tagline: Browser-based audio transcription with Whisper and Transformers.js.
integrations.description: Browser-based audio transcription using Whisper and Transformers.js, storing results in Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage.

integrations.title: Video Object Detection
integrations.tagline: Real-time browser video object detection with Transformers.js + YOLOv9.
integrations.description: Real-time video object detection monitoring demo using Transformers.js and Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage. Runs YOLOv9 fully in the browser with automatic capture intervals, no server or GPU required. Detected snapshots and metadata are stored in low cost, scalable B2 storage for analysis and retention.

integrations.title: Background Removal
integrations.tagline: Browser AI image background removal with Transformers.js and RMBG-1.4.
integrations.description: Browser-based AI image background removal app using Transformers.js and the RMBG-1.4 model, storing original and cutout images in Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage — no GPU or backend required.

integrations.title: Openclaw B2 Sync Backup
integrations.tagline: OpenClaw automatic backup and sync to Backblaze B2.
integrations.description: OpenClaw automatic backup and sync to Backblaze B2. Keep state durable across machines, restore instantly on new hardware, and roll back to previous snapshots if configs break or memory becomes corrupted.

integrations.title: Image Generation Prompt Flow
integrations.tagline: Compare GPT Image, DALL-E, Gemini, and Google Imagen prompts side by side.
integrations.description: AI image generation prompt flow example app focused on prompt engineering and prompt optimization, comparing models GPT Image, DALL-E, Gemini Nano Banana, and Google Imagen. Shows how image prompts are structured, refined, and evolved from input to final output, with clear prompt lineage for learning and experimentation.

integrations.title: Pixeltable Multimodal Data
integrations.tagline: Notebooks for managing multimodal datasets with Pixeltable and Backblaze B2.
integrations.description: Example notebooks showing how to use Pixeltable with Backblaze B2 for managing and querying multimodal datasets.

integrations.title: Meltano
integrations.tagline: Backblaze B2 as a state backend for Meltano data pipelines.
integrations.description: Meltano supports Backblaze B2 as a state backend via its S3-compatible API. Configure `state_backend.uri` with your B2 bucket and credentials and your pipeline state persists to B2 between runs — no extra plugin, fully documented upstream.

integrations.title: Pixeltable
integrations.tagline: Backblaze B2 as S3-compatible storage for Pixeltable's table stores.
integrations.description: Pixeltable is a declarative table-based system for multimodal AI data. Configure your B2 endpoint and credentials and Pixeltable persists tables, media, and computed columns to B2 — same path as the S3 / GCS / R2 backends.

integrations.title: B2 Action
integrations.tagline: The Backblaze B2 GitHub Action
integrations.description: The Backblaze B2 GitHub Action
